def positive_copy_of_mapping_created_only_to_read_values():
    rule_id = "copy_of_mapping_created_only_to_read_values"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag mappings copied defensively even though the next code only reads."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
